Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Continued To Oct-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

PLAINTIFF NAOMI JANE GRAY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF NAOMI JANE GRAY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's hearing to confirm the arbitration award is ordered off calendar. The notice of hearing does not include a proof of service showing respondent was notified of the hearing, and there is no proof showing that respondent received notice of the petition itself as required by Code of Civil Procedure, section 1290.4.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Naomi Jane Gray And Shades Of Gray Law Group, P.C. To File Records Under Seal In Connection With Their Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONERS NAOMI GRAY, AND SHADES OF GRAY LAW GROUP, P.C.'s Motion To File Records Under Seal In Connection With Their Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to seal the unredacted version of Attachment 6(c) to the petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. The material to be seal concerns confidential attorney-client communications and work product that are entitled to protection under the law. The court finds that (1) there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the record; (2) the overriding interest supports sealing the record; (3) a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; (4) the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and (5) no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
